sentences.english: I used to go to school daily.
sentences.pronunciation: i used to go to school daily

sentences.english: He used to smoke.
sentences.pronunciation: he used to smoke

sentences.pronunciation: we used to live in a village

sentences.english: She used to play cricket.
sentences.pronunciation: she used to play cricket

sentences.english: They used to study together.
sentences.pronunciation: they used to study together

sentences.english: I used to sleep early.
sentences.pronunciation: i used to sleep early

sentences.english: Did you use to live here?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम पहले यहाँ रहते थे?
sentences.pronunciation: did you use to live here

sentences.english: He used to be very shy.
sentences.pronunciation: he used to be very shy

sentences.english: I used to listen to this song a lot.
sentences.hindi: मैं यह गाना बहुत सुनता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i used to listen to this song a lot

sentences.english: They used to meet every week.
sentences.pronunciation: they used to meet every week

sentences.english: I used to play football.
sentences.pronunciation: i used to play football

sentences.english: She used to get angry a lot.

sentences.pronunciation: she used to get angry a lot

sentences.english: We used to go by bus.
sentences.hindi: हम पहले बस से जाते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: we used to go by bus

sentences.english: I did not use to do this.
sentences.pronunciation: i did not use to do this

sentences.english: He used to wake up early.
sentences.pronunciation: he used to wake up early

sentences.english: I used to study a lot.
sentences.pronunciation: i used to study a lot

sentences.english: They used to work together.

sentences.pronunciation: they used to work together

sentences.english: Did he use to come here?
sentences.hindi: क्या वह पहले यहाँ आता था?
sentences.pronunciation: did he use to come here

sentences.english: I did not use to drink tea.
sentences.hindi: मैं पहले चाय नहीं पीता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i did not use to drink tea

sentences.english: We used to travel every year.
